display.purpose: Hero and article H1 headlines only. Source Serif 4.

headline.purpose: Feed card titles and section headers. Serif via .news-headline.

title.purpose: Sub-section headings and widget labels. Figtree sans.

body.purpose: Article prose and UI copy. Max 42rem in long-form columns.

label.purpose: Uppercase category kickers via .news-label — use sparingly.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Article tiles and feed cards on hover only.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Compose palette and block inspector overlays.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Header dropdown menus and shadcn popovers.

motion.name: ease-chrome
motion.purpose: Sidebar width and header offset transitions — 200ms linear/ease-out.

motion.name: spring-pill
motion.purpose: Sub-nav active tab pill via framer-motion layoutId activeTab.

components.name: Join Button (Chrome)
components.description: Primary conversion CTA in the fixed header.
components.css: .ds-btn-join { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #059669; border-radius: 6px; background-color: #059669; color: #ffffff; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-join:hover { background-color: #10b981; border-color: #10b981; } .ds-btn-join:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Login Button (Chrome)
components.description: Secondary auth action in header — transparent with white border.
components.css: .ds-btn-login { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); border-radius: 6px; background-color: transparent; color: #ffffff; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-login:hover { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); } .ds-btn-login:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sub-nav Active Pill
components.description: Active tab indicator in the news sub-navigation pill bar.
components.css: .ds-subnav-track { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 24px; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-subnav-tab { position: relative; height: 36px; padding: 4px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.70); font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, background-color 0.2s; } .ds-subnav-tab:hover { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; } .ds-subnav-tab--active { background-color: #ee3536; color: #ffffff; } .ds-subnav-tab--active:hover { background-color: #dc2a2f; } .ds-subnav-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Active Item
components.description: Active navigation item in the collapsible sidebar.
components.html: LatestExpert Analysis
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; background-color: #2d2d2d; width: 240px; } .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.70); font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; } .ds-sidebar-item--active { background-color: #ee3536; color: #ffffff; } .ds-sidebar-item--active:hover { background-color: #dc2a2f; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: News Article Card
components.description: Standard feed tile in the content area — flat at rest, shadow on hover.
components.html:
NFL

Week 1 Opening Lines Shift After Preseason

2 hours ago
components.css: .ds-news-card { padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background-color: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-news-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-news-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #ee3536; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-news-headline { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: "Source Serif 4", Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-news-meta { margin: 0; color: #737373; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Category Label
components.description: Uppercase category kicker — red text, no background. Use sparingly.
components.css: .ds-category-label { color: #ee3536; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Content Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button inside the content area (shadcn default).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background-color: #0a0a0a; color: #ffffff; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: rgba(10,10,10,0.80); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }

narrative.overview: BetOnline News is editorial content delivered inside the BetOnline product shell — not a detached blog skin. The dark chrome (header, sidebar, sub-nav) is always on-brand and always dark; the content area beneath is a scoped reading surface that can be light or dark without breaking platform identity. Confidence comes from consistency with betonline.ag; premium comes from Source Serif headlines and careful reading rhythm inside a tool users already trust.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-layer color: fixed dark chrome + theme-scoped content ([data-content-area])
Figtree for all UI; Source Serif 4 for headlines and editorial display only
Red accent (#ee3536) reserved for active nav, category labels, and primary CTAs — not decoration
Flat surfaces at rest; elevation appears only on hover or floating overlays
Collapsible sidebar (16rem expanded / 3rem icon rail) drives header and sub-nav offset
Reduced-motion alternatives for spring pill animation, marquees, and sidebar transitions

rules.name: The Chrome Lock Rule
rules.body: Header, sidebar, and sub-nav never inherit content theme. They always render inside data-bol-chrome with dark --ds-nav-bg / --ds-sidebar-bg. Content light/dark toggle affects [data-content-area] only.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: BetOnline Red appears on active navigation, category labels, and primary actions — ≤10% of any screen. If red is everywhere, it is nowhere.

rules.name: The Serif Boundary Rule
rules.body: Source Serif 4 stops at the content headline layer. Nav pills, sidebar items, buttons, form labels, and metadata are always Figtree.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Content cards ship with border + flat fill. Shadow is a hover affordance, not a permanent decoration.

dos: Do wrap every page in BolShell with --ds-* tokens and data-bol-chrome on header/sidebar.
Do scope light/dark content theme to [data-content-area] — chrome stays dark regardless.
Do use Source Serif 4 for headlines and Figtree for everything else in the UI layer.
Do use BetOnline Red for active nav state and category labels only — sparingly.
Do provide @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for spring animations, marquees, and sidebar transitions.
Do use full 1px borders on cards (--ds-content-card-border) — not colored side stripes.
Do match header/sub-nav left offset to sidebar width (16rem / 3rem) on desktop.
donts: Don't ship a legacy WordPress news layout — white editorial column, text-only left nav, detached serif stack mimicking the old site.
Don't use generic AI blog templates — cream backgrounds, identical card grids, uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section.
Don't render detached CMS preview pages that ignore the BOL Shadcn shell from design-main.
Don't put Source Serif on nav labels, buttons, sidebar items, or metadata.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or side-stripe border accents on cards.
Don't apply glassmorphism to content cards — blur is for sub-nav chrome only.
Don't force min-h-screen on content wrappers — pages should end at content, not create phantom scroll.
Don't use arbitrary z-index values like 9999 outside the documented scale (sub-nav 90, header 101, overlays 120–230).
